expected_records.title: Find A Friend
expected_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Bruno photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to the Concierge Desk to receive a surprise!

description.text: Search the Resort for a hidden Bruno photo prop.

expected_records.title: Nature Walk
expected_records.description: Self-led nature trail to view the wildlife and landscape of the Resort. Pick up a Nature Guide at Panchito’s Gifts & Sundries, Concierge Desk or from a Recreation Cast Member to get started.

expected_quarantine_records.title: Colors Of Coronado Painting Experience
expected_quarantine_records.description: Get in touch with your inner artist during this master-led painting class. This experience is recommended for Guests ages I2 and up. Space is limited. To book, search Colors of Coronado Painting Experience on the My Disney Experience app.

expected_quarantine_records.title: Sangria University
expected_quarantine_records.description: Discuss the history of sangria and learn the recipes used to make the 4 in-house varieties served at Three Bridges Bar and Grill. Enjoy a tasting and you'll even get to make your own glass! Advanced booking required through the My Disney Experience app by searching Sangria University.

expected_quarantine_records.title: Resort Scavenger Hunt
expected_quarantine_records.description: Pick up a Clue Guide from the Concierge Desk, Panchito’s Gift & Sundries, or any Recreation Cast Member to participate.
